General.Name: Soho China Ltd
General.Description: SOHO China Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate development, property leasing, and related management activities in the People's Republic of China. It also operates serviced hotels. SOHO China Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: Chaowai SOHO, Tower A, Beijing, China, 100020
